title: Read-only multi-project portfolio control view
acceptance: One local portfolio can aggregate multiple project roots, workflows, blockers, risks, budgets, dependencies, and releases.
Unavailable or invalid projects degrade independently and no portfolio read mutates any target project.
Portfolio data is available through compact machine-readable CLI output and the Observatory presentation layer.
